printers.title: Printers
printers.description: Configured Bambu printers managed by this platform.

name.title: Printer Name
name.description: Display name used for this printer's HomeKit accessories.

model.title: Printer Model
model.description: Select the Bambu printer model for Accessory Information metadata.

ipAddress.title: Printer IP Address
ipAddress.description: Local IP address of this Bambu printer.

serialNumber.title: Printer Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Printer serial number used in MQTT topics.

lanAccessCode.title: LAN Access Code
lanAccessCode.description: LAN-only access code from the printer's network settings.

mqttPort.title: MQTT Port
mqttPort.description: MQTT broker port exposed by the printer.

rejectUnauthorized.title: Verify TLS Certificate
rejectUnauthorized.description: Enable strict TLS certificate validation. Keep disabled for most local printer certificates.

enableSpeedControl.title: Enable Print Speed Control
enableSpeedControl.description: Adds a HomeKit slider accessory to set the print speed profile.

enableCamera.title: Enable Camera Accessory
enableCamera.description: Adds a HomeKit camera accessory and streams from the printer RTSPS endpoint.

cameraName.title: Camera Accessory Name
cameraName.description: Optional override for the camera accessory display name.

cameraRtspUrl.title: Camera Stream URL
cameraRtspUrl.description: Optional custom camera URL. Leave empty to auto-build from printer IP and LAN access code.

ffmpegPath.title: ffmpeg Path
ffmpegPath.description: Path to the ffmpeg binary used for snapshots and stream relay.

cameraVideoCodec.title: Camera Video Encoder
cameraVideoCodec.description: Encoder for the HomeKit live stream. Use h264_videotoolbox on macOS for hardware encoding, or libx264 for software encoding.

enableHksv.title: Enable HomeKit Secure Video
enableHksv.description: Enables HKSV recording management services for iCloud event recording.

enableLocalMotionDetection.title: Enable Local Motion Detection
enableLocalMotionDetection.description: Runs local frame-difference motion detection and publishes Motion Sensor events.

motionSensitivity.title: Motion Sensitivity
motionSensitivity.description: Higher values detect smaller motion changes. Range 1-100.

hksvPrebufferLengthMs.title: HKSV Prebuffer (ms)
hksvPrebufferLengthMs.description: Prebuffer duration advertised to HomeKit Secure Video.

hksvFragmentLengthMs.title: HKSV Fragment Length (ms)
hksvFragmentLengthMs.description: Fragment length for HKSV fMP4 chunks.

hksvMaxRecordingSeconds.title: HKSV Max Recording Seconds
hksvMaxRecordingSeconds.description: Upper limit for a single recording stream when an event is active.
